page.title: Advanced Conditionals
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Conditionals - C1 mixed conditionals, formal condition markers, and limited conditional inversion.
page.subtitle_text: C1 mixed conditionals, formal condition markers, and limited conditional inversion.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"Advanced Conditionals: compact C1 anchors for mixed conditionals, formal condition markers, and careful conditional inversion.","rules":[{"label":"Past to present result","text":"Use if + past perfect with would + base form or would be + -ing for a present result.","example":"If I had accepted the offer, I would be working abroad now."},{"label":"Present to past result","text":"Use if + past simple with would have + past participle for a past result.","example":"If she were more organized, she would have submitted the report on time."},{"label":"Formal markers and inversion","text":"Use provided that, as long as, unless, and limited had-inversion where the meaning is clear.","example":"Had I known earlier, I would have acted differently."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English C1 lesson package.
